name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, inefficient inspection management causes delayed maintenance reports. We provide automated inspection management instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of property inspections leading to delayed maintenance reports.
